name: usage-guard
description: Callback-only Codex usage guard that checks structured rate-limit events after each turn.

interface.shortDescription: Check Codex usage after each turn.
interface.longDescription: Usage Guard installs a Stop hook that reads the latest structured Codex token_count event after each turn. It alerts when account usage crosses the configured threshold without running a daemon or polling loop.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect Usage Guard status and recent alerts.
